case.title: WABASH RAILROAD CO. v. COMMERCIAL TRANSPORT, INC.

opinion.h: WABASH RAILROAD CO. v. COMMERCIAL TRANSPORT, INC., 361 U.S. 1 (1959)
WABASH RAILROAD CO. ET AL. v. COMMERCIAL TRANSPORT, INC., ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE EASTERN DISTRICT OF ILLINOIS. No. 68. Decided October 12, 1959.
opinion.p: Eugene S. Davis, Urchie B. Ellis, J. L. Lenihan and Amos M. Mathews for appellants.
Solicitor General Rankin, Acting Assistant Attorney General Bicks, Charles H. Weston and Henry Geller for the United States, and Mack Stephenson for Commercial Transport, Inc., appellees.
The motions to affirm are granted and the judgment is affirmed.
